steps.description: Click the "Expand Navigation" button (with sidebar icon) located at the top left of the M365 Copilot Chat web interface.
Click the "Show repair records assigned to Karin Blair" chat message in the M365 Copilot web app in main section.
Click the blue microphone button inside the chat input area to initiate voice input  page of the M365 Copilot web interface.
Click the "Always allow" button in the permissions prompt of the M365 Copilot chat interface to grant vscuse_app_wverelocal continuous access for processing repair record queries.
@assertion get ai send back message include "Oil Change"
Click the "Close" (X) button in the top-right corner of the Chrome browser window to exit the M365 Copilot chat application.
